descricao: Help build a more water-secure world with solutions that optimize water use across our operations or enhance water quality and availability in high-stress communities. Help supply chains reach net zero carbon emissions by finding affordable technologies to decarbonize our value chains. Help close the loop and create a circular global economy where waste is eliminated, resources are continually circulated and nature is regenerated through new packaging systems, recycling infrastructure, and alternative food supply options. Help farmers produce sustainable and regenerative high-yielding, high-quality crops by leveraging science, technology, and financing. Help protect, renew, and grow the biodiversity of all ecosystems to sustain life on Earth, and maintain the foundation of our supply chains and businesses.
Help build a more water-secure world with solutions that optimize water use across our operations or enhance water quality and availability in high-stress communities.
Help supply chains reach net zero carbon emissions by finding affordable technologies to decarbonize our value chains.

Help close the loop and create a circular global economy where waste is eliminated, resources are continually circulated and nature is regenerated through new packaging systems, recycling infrastructure, and alternative food supply options.
Help farmers produce sustainable and regenerative high-yielding, high-quality crops by leveraging science, technology, and financing.
Help protect, renew, and grow the biodiversity of all ecosystems to sustain life on Earth, and maintain the foundation of our supply chains and businesses.
Help create economic prosperity, workplace safety, inclusion and long-term environmental health.
Help increase the well-being of our people, consumers, and communities so they can fully participate in social, cultural, and recreational activities.
